metadata.file_path: /Volumes/My Passport/Ojo otra vez musica de Tidal Original descarga/Consolidado2025/Tracks/Elvis Presley - Viva Las Vegas.flac
metadata.title: Viva Las Vegas
metadata.album: Bossa Nova Baby: The Ultimate Elvis Presley Party Album
metadata.lyrics:
[00:07.01] Bright light city gonna set my soul
[00:09.97] Gonna set my soul on fire
[00:13.13] Got a whole lot of money that's ready to burn
[00:16.56] So get those stakes up higher
[00:19.67] There's a thousand pretty women waitin' out there
[00:23.62] And they're all livin' devil may care
[00:26.79] And I'm just the devil with love to spare
[00:29.83] So Viva Las Vegas, Viva Las Vegas
[00:37.03] How I wish that there were more
[00:39.97] Than the 24 hours in the day
[00:43.42] And even if there were 40 more
[00:46.83] I wouldn't sleep a minute away
[00:49.64] Oh, there's black jack, and poker, and the roulette wheel
[00:53.34] A fortune won and lost on every deal
[00:56.79] All you need's a strong heart and a nerve of steel
[01:00.29] Viva Las Vegas, Viva Las Vegas
[01:07.10] Viva Las Vegas with your neon flashin'
[01:09.87] And your one arm bandits crashin'
[01:11.96] All those hopes down the drain
[01:15.13] Viva Las Vegas turnin' day into nighttime
[01:17.95] And turnin' night into daytime
[01:19.94] If you see it once, you'll never be the same again
[01:26.42] I'm gonna keep on the run, I'm gonna have me some fun
[01:29.97] If it costs me my very last dime
[01:33.08] If I wind up broke up well
[01:35.30] I'll always remember that I had a swingin' time
[01:40.35] I'm gonna give it everything I've got
[01:43.91] Lady luck, please, let the dice stay hot
[01:46.87] And let me shoot a seven with every shot
[01:50.56] Viva Las Vegas, Viva Las Vegas
[01:57.08] Viva Las Vega, Viva, Viva Las Vegas
[02:07.67]
